title: The Institute of Islamic Education and Research (Repeal) Ordinance, 1982
title_en: The Institute of Islamic Education and Research (Repeal) Ordinance, 1982
description: An Ordinance to repeal the Institute of Islamic Education and Research Act, 1980. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Institute of Islamic Education and Research Act, 1980 (XXXI of 1980); NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamation of the 24th March, 1982, and in exercise of all powers enabling him in that behalf, the Chief Martial Law Administrator is pleased to make and promulgate the following Ordinance:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Ordinance may be called the Institute of Islamic Education and Research (Repeal) Ordinance, 1982 .

provisions.title: 2. Repeal and savings
